title: CLSID
text: CLSID Internal class ID of the COM component. It is automatically provided when the ProgID is selected. Description Once the ProgID property is exited, the CLSID field is updated with the internal class ID of the ProgID. Alternatively, you can enter a 32-hex-digit CLSID directly to confirm that the correct ProgID is entered. If a ProgID is not valid, the CLSID is set to <Unknown ProgID> , and the CLSID and Bind To fields are unavailable. If the COM Connector is not available, the CLSID is set to <COM Driver not available> , and both the CLSID and Bind To fields are dimmed. Applies To Signature Implementation (COM) Related Links ProgID Name of the COM ProgID. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
